chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 400 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.1655/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on CMA No.1656/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 23.05.2024 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non- prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
